title: Echoes of Tomorrow
description: The journey ends. Or perhaps, it's only beginning.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: A month since your return. Spring arrives, bringing renewal.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: Da? I've been thinking about mother's music box.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: The melody. You said you recreated it from memory. But... what if you didn't have to?

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: What if the original still exists? What if mother's things weren't all lost?

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: You show him a letter, hidden in the workshop. Addressed to you. Handwriting you've never seen, yet somehow know.

closing.speaker: Father
closing.text: *reading, voice shaking* 'My dearest girl, if you're reading this, you've grown brave and clever. The Order took me because I knew too much about their plans. But I left clues—'

closing.speaker: Narrator
closing.text: He can't continue. Tears stream down.

closing.speaker: Veracity
closing.text: The letter is dated three weeks ago. She's alive, Da. And I think... I think I know how to find her.

closing.speaker: Rainie
closing.text: I thought we were done with adventures!

closing.speaker: Veracity
closing.text: Maybe adventures are never really done. Maybe they just... lead to new ones.

closing.speaker: Narrator
closing.text: Outside, a music box plays—mother's true melody on the wind. You can't see its source, but you know it's real.

closing.speaker: Veracity
closing.text: We're coming, mother. Hold on. We're coming.

choices.text: Plan carefully. This is too important to rush.
Start immediately. Every moment mother waits is a moment too long.

puzzle.title: The Cipher of Hope
puzzle.instructions: Sort through the letter's hidden messages. Find the path forward.
